title: Fix blank LV design score space plot
description: Investigate why plot_design_score_space() can render an empty plot for the SDAM result and adjust the helper so it produces visible LV1/LV2 condition centroids.
close_reason: Improved plot_design_score_space() aspect handling with padded symmetric fixed limits, clip-off labels, an aspect='free' option, and tests.

title: Fix pkgdown article index for SDAM vignette
description: Add the existing sdam-firstlevel-task-pls vignette to the explicit pkgdown articles index so pkgdown::build_site can build articles without missing-index errors.
close_reason: Added sdam-firstlevel-task-pls to the explicit pkgdown article index; temporary pkgdown article build now renders all articles.

title: Add reduced-model permutation inference for design-subspace tests
description: Implement reduced-model-respecting or constrained permutation support for test_design_terms() and compare_designs(), including maxT adjustment and clear exchangeability metadata from pls_design().

title: Add observed Task PLS design-subspace tests
close_reason: Added centered Task PLS design-subspace helpers, optional crossblock retention, observed term/nested statistics, LV decomposition, documentation, and tests.

title: Add formula grouping to design score space plot
description: Support formula syntax such as ~ group + condition | task in as_design_score_space() and plot_design_score_space(), so examples can collapse over omitted variables or facet/split by selected variables.
close_reason: Added formula-based aggregation and faceting to as_design_score_space() and plot_design_score_space(), documented examples, and covered collapse/facet behavior with tests.

title: Add two-LV design score space plot
description: Add a reusable plot that places group-condition design-score centroids in a two-latent-variable space, with condition labels for interpreting examples such as SDAM LV1 versus LV2.
close_reason: Added as_design_score_space() and plot_design_score_space(), integrated LV1/LV2 design-space output into the SDAM example and vignette, and covered the helper with tests.

title: Add general PLS design interpretation plots
description: Provide reusable extraction and plotting helpers that rehydrate flattened design scores with a user-supplied condition key, including heatmaps, interaction plots, and factorial contrast summaries for tutorial use.
close_reason: Implemented generic design-score extraction, factorial contrast decomposition, design interpretation plots, SDAM tutorial integration, and tests.

title: Document Task PLS design-subspace inference
description: Update or add vignettes covering pls_design(), design_projectors(), decompose_design_terms(), test_design_terms(), and compare_designs() for the new Task PLS design-subspace workflow.
close_reason: Added a runnable Task PLS design-subspace vignette and linked it from pkgdown, README, and the getting-started vignette.

title: Add computational invariant tests for design-subspace PLS
description: Use the design-computational-tests strategy to add oracle, metamorphic, randomized invariant, and adversarial tests for the new Task PLS design-subspace layer.
close_reason: Added oracle, metamorphic, randomized invariant, and adversarial tests for Task PLS design-subspace statistics; full devtools::test passes.

title: Harden Task PLS design-subspace edge cases
description: Address review nits for observed design-subspace support: row-order/row-weight handling, clearer nested comparison validation, documentation for non-orthogonal LV fractions, and SSB centering regression tests.
close_reason: Hardened design-subspace cell metadata checks, row-weight handling, nested-design validation, LV fraction docs, and SSB centering regression tests.

title: Add plots for design-subspace test summaries
description: Add plot_design_tests() or equivalent visualization for observed and future inferred design-subspace term/nested outputs without mixing inference into existing descriptive design-score plots.

title: Add performance baseline for design-subspace PLS summaries
description: Add a benchmark or scheduled slow-test guardrail for design_projectors(), test_design_terms(), and compare_designs() on representative cell x feature sizes. Avoid brittle timing thresholds in ordinary unit tests.
